name: X Connector
description: Post, reply, like, retweet, follow and read your X (Twitter) timeline, mentions, bookmarks and profile — all through chat. Connect once via 'Sign in with X'; everything else happens by asking. You never see or pay for an X API key.

tools.name: connect_x_account
tools.description: Get a 'Sign in with X' link to connect an X (Twitter) account to your X Connector. Use for: connect X, connect Twitter, link my X account.

params_schema.description: No input required — imperal_id comes from ctx.user, not from the LLM.
params_schema.title: NoParams

tools.name: list_x_accounts
tools.description: List connected X (Twitter) accounts. Use for: what X accounts are connected, is my X account connected.

params_schema.description: No input required — imperal_id comes from ctx.user, not from the LLM.
params_schema.title: NoParams

tools.name: disconnect_x_account
tools.description: Disconnect an X (Twitter) account from your X Connector. Use for: disconnect X, disconnect Twitter.

tools.name: post_tweet
tools.description: Post a new tweet to X. Use for: post to X, post to Twitter, tweet this.

media_ids.description: Pre-uploaded media IDs to attach, if any.
media_ids.title: Media Ids

tools.name: post_thread
tools.description: Post a thread (chain of connected tweets) to X, in order. Use for: post a thread, post this as multiple tweets.

texts.description: One tweet per entry, posted as a reply chain in order.
texts.title: Texts

tools.name: reply_to_post
tools.description: Reply to an X post. Use for: reply to this tweet, respond to this post.

tools.name: quote_post
tools.description: Quote-tweet an X post with your own comment. Use for: quote this tweet.

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Permanently delete one of your own X posts. Use for: delete this tweet.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: like_post
tools.description: Like an X post. Use for: like this tweet.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: unlike_post
tools.description: Unlike an X post you previously liked. Use for: unlike this tweet.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: retweet_post
tools.description: Retweet (repost) an X post. Use for: retweet this, repost this tweet.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: undo_retweet
tools.description: Undo a retweet/repost of an X post. Use for: undo this retweet.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: bookmark_post
tools.description: Bookmark an X post for later. Use for: bookmark this tweet, save this post.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: remove_bookmark
tools.description: Remove an X post from your bookmarks. Use for: remove this bookmark, unsave this post.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: follow_user
tools.description: Follow an X user by username. Use for: follow this account, follow @someone.

tools.name: unfollow_user
tools.description: Unfollow an X user by username. Use for: unfollow this account.

tools.name: block_user
tools.description: Block an X user by username. Use for: block this account.

tools.name: mute_user
tools.description: Mute an X user by username. Use for: mute this account.

tools.name: get_home_timeline
tools.description: Read your X home timeline (posts from accounts you follow). Use for: show my X timeline, what's new on X.

tools.name: get_mentions
tools.description: Read recent posts that mention you on X. Use for: who mentioned me on X, my X mentions.

tools.name: get_my_posts
tools.description: Read your own recent X posts. Use for: show my recent tweets, my X posts.

tools.name: get_bookmarks
tools.description: Read your bookmarked X posts. Use for: show my X bookmarks, saved tweets.

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Search recent public X posts by keyword/operators. Use for: search X for, find tweets about.

query.description: X search query (supports X's own search operators).
query.title: Query

tools.name: get_post_metrics
tools.description: Get engagement metrics (likes/retweets/replies/quotes/impressions) for one X post. Use for: how is this tweet doing.

post_id.description: Post ID — from a read/search result, never invented.
post_id.title: Post Id

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Look up a public X user's profile by username. Use for: who is this X account, look up this X profile.

tools.name: get_followers
tools.description: List your (or the connected account's) X followers. Use for: who follows me on X, my X followers.

limit.description: Max items to return (capped at 6 — followers/following cost more per item).
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: get_following
tools.description: List who you (the connected account) follow on X. Use for: who do I follow on X, my X following list.

limit.description: Max items to return (capped at 6 — followers/following cost more per item).
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: get_trends
tools.description: What's trending on X right now, for a location (defaults to Worldwide). Use for: what's trending on X/Twitter, X trending topics.

woeid.description: Yahoo WOEID for the location. Defaults to 1 (Worldwide). 23424977=US, 23424975=UK.
woeid.title: Woeid

secrets.name: backend_jwt
secrets.description: Platform JWT authenticating this extension to the x-connector-api backend microservice. Developer-managed only — never entered or seen by end users.
